run_scope: Bounded validation run for truthful control-surface, context, traceability, and decision-memory changes.
summary: The bounded baseline clears the frozen eval suite and can promote its claims.

case_results.title: Discover truthfulness
case_results.notes: Discover outputs stay strong, traceable, and explicitly bounded enough to clear the frozen internal-use truthfulness bar.

case_results.title: Alignment traceability
case_results.notes: Docs and presentation preserve stakeholder-ready traceability, though the package still carries some mixed release provenance.

case_results.title: Improvement honesty
case_results.notes: The scoring loop now stays grounded in frozen eval, decision-memory, validation, and release-gate evidence strongly enough to clear the internal-use honesty bar.

case_results.title: Control-surface truth
case_results.notes: The CLI now surfaces blocked promotion, eval pressure, and watch boundaries honestly enough to clear the frozen internal-use truth bar.

case_results.title: Decision memory retrieval
case_results.notes: Decision memory covers reversibility, rejected paths, tradeoffs, kill criteria, and follow-up dates.

recommended_next_action: Use the cleared bounded baseline to expand the governed research superpower and prepare the next strategy refresh.
